title: Erik Madsen
text: Home * People * Erik Madsen Erik Madsen [1] Erik Madsen , an American professional programmer and application development supervisor specializing in SharePoint , workflow , and service oriented architecture . As an advocate of Visual Studio and C# .NET as well as amateur chess player, Erik is author of RumbleMinze and its successor MadChess [2] , both written in C# and conform to the Universal Chess Interface .
